title: Loops
source_outline: while loop: loop conditions; infinite loops and how to avoid them
for loop: iterating over sequences; the loop variable
enumerate() and zip(): index + value with enumerate(); pairing sequences with zip()
break and continue: early exit; skipping an iteration
Nested loops: loops inside loops; the loop else clause (brief)

artifact_plan.diagram_intent: loop control-flow trace: while condition->body->back-to-test; plus nested-loop outer/inner execution order; break/continue exit arrows

next_assessment.title: Python Core Skills Checkpoint
next_assessment.outcome: The learner can translate a plain-English problem into correct, tested Python using variables, control flow, and functions.
